content.en:
At this time, there were only a few people in the Innate Origin Pool who were cultivating, and more people were watching from the outside.

The huge Innate Origin Pool is like a lake, and the rich Innate Origin Breath permeates out, but many people don't dare to stay here at all, and often just come over to take a look and immediately go away.

Ye Tian's arrival attracted the attention of many people.

"It's the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi of the Void Heaven One Vein, and he's here too!"

"Didn't he come to have a look?"

"He must have come to take a look, is it difficult or can he not enter the Innate Origin Pool? He is an eight-star peak god general, and the difference between him and the Heavenly Monarch is too great, even the Heavenly Monarch does not dare to enter the Innate Origin Pool, if he dares to enter, wouldn't it be looking for death?"

"You see, he's walking towards the Innate Origin Pool, oh my God, he's stepping into the Innate Origin Pool!"

......

When Ye Tian entered the Innate Origin Pool, everyone was shocked.

Without him, just because Ye Tian is the ancestor of the Dao!

As a Dao Ancestor, its potential is so high, as long as it does not fall in the future, it will become a true ancestor, and there is even a glimmer of hope to achieve Dao Ancestor!

It can be said that even if Ye Tian does not go to the Innate Origin Pool, his potential will still be against the sky in the future, and there is no need to take risks.

However, Ye Tian risked his life to enter the Innate Origin Pool.

"Daozi, don't go to the Innate Origin Pool!"

A Heavenly Monarch of the Void Heaven Pulse hurriedly reminded.

However, Ye Tian had already entered the Innate Origin Pool, and he didn't listen to the other party's persuasion at all.

Rumble!!!

As soon as he entered the Innate Origin Pool, the extremely rich Origin Energy was eroded by the purple light energy, and under this erosion, the luster of the Zilin Yi was constantly dimming, and it couldn't last long at all.

Ye Tian manipulated Zi Lin Yi and released a trace of innate origin into his body.

Bang!!!!

The terrifying change came, and the physical body began to transform rapidly, not the transformation of the strength of the physical body, but the transformation of the life level.

However, along with it, the purple light continued to erode the flesh.

"Purple Light Talent, turn on!"

"Purple Armor Talent, open!"

The two talents related to purple light, coupled with the Void Heaven Dao Body, allowed Ye Tian to easily resist the purple light energy, unless others had special means, the Heavenly Monarch was far inferior to him.

The transformation of the life level made Ye Tian's countless cells transform in destruction and rebirth all the time.

No elixir is far from being comparable to the innate origin, this is the real high-level life energy, the purest origin energy, even if it is a Dao Ancestor, there is no way to create such an innate origin.

It didn't take long for the purple linyi on his body to hold on, and Ye Tian hurriedly changed into a new zilinyi.

At present, with his strength, he can only attract a little innate origin, if he loses the purple linyi, he will be covered by infinite purple light energy, even if he has purple light talent and purple armor talent, he will not be able to resist.

As time passed, Ye Tian consumed one purple coat after another, and the degree of life transformation became faster and faster.

Ascending from an eighth-order life to a ninth-order life is a real great transformation, a super sublimation of life, and it is not achieved overnight, so it takes a long time for Ye Tian to complete the transformation.

"Underestimating the process of transforming an eighth-order life into a ninth-order life, a dozen or so purple Lin clothes are simply not enough!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If he leaves the Innate Origin Pool now, the previous exercises will be in vain, and if he quits the transformation halfway, it will also have an impact on his foundation, and it will take a long time to make up for it.

When he makes up for the foundation and wants to come to the Innate Origin Pool, the energy of the Innate Origin Pool may be exhausted.

"Let's ask the disciples of the Void Heaven Temple for help!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he sent a message to the nearby disciples of the Void Heaven First Lineage, exchanging it for purple lin clothes from them.

If it were someone else, I am afraid that I would not be able to change Zilin clothes, but Ye Tian is the ancestor of the Dao, but he really survived in the innate origin pool, and no one dares not to give Ye Tian face.

Soon, one by one, the purple Lin clothes fell into Ye Tian's hands.

At the same time, the news of Ye Tian's cultivation in the Innate Origin Pool spread out, causing a huge sensation.

The Tower of the God of War.

When the Yunzi Divine Maiden heard Ye Tian's news, she was immediately shocked: "The Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son actually entered the Innate Origin Pool, and he gathered the treasures to compete with the purple light energy so quickly?"

The Left Wolf God of the Void Heaven One Vein learned that Ye Tian had entered the Innate Origin Pool, and he wanted to compete with Ye Tian, but he resisted this impulse, according to his intelligence analysis, he could not survive in the Innate Origin Pool.

Even if his strength is stronger than Ye Tian, entering the Innate Origin Pool often has nothing to do with strength, but he doesn't know that even the Heavenly Monarch has fallen and died.

If you want to enter the Innate Origin Pool, there is only one way, and that is to resist the purple light energy, otherwise if you want to advance to the ninth-order life level, you are simply looking for death.

The god generals in the previous life on the god general list were all crazy, and they were preparing frantically one by one, because once Ye Tian successfully advanced to the ninth order life, he would definitely be able to enter the nine-star god general.

They don't want to be surpassed by Ye Tian!

Time passed day by day, and Ye Tian almost carried out the most critical moment in the Innate Origin Pool.

Many people were curious if Ye Tian could break the shackles and become a ninth-order lifeform.

Being able to persist in the Innate Origin Pool for a long time does not mean that you can really break the life level, if you can't hold on, you will still lose your efforts, or even fall into the Innate Origin Pool.

"It's coming, it's coming!"

Ye Tian has always paid attention to the situation in his body, although the erosion of the physical body is relatively serious, but the breath of life is as majestic as hundreds of millions of suns, and a wisp of life breath can be turned into the sun to shine on a big world.

His life level completely surpassed that of an eighth-order life, and was even comparable to an ordinary ninth-order life.

At this moment, his physical body has been successfully transformed, only the soul is missing, and the soul has also transformed ninety into nine, leaving the final transformation.

Once the soul transforms and steps into the ninth-order life soul, then the whole person has completely become a ninth-order life.

"Give me a breakthrough!"

Ye Tian's soul turned into a humanoid sun, the infinite golden luster flickered, and the invisible shackles shattered one after another under the infinite soul power.

It was the soul shackles, and it was also the last shackles that bound the ninth-order life.

But this last shackle was wiped out under the impact of the Innate Origin, and if it was to rely on its own strength, it would be almost impossible to break it, and it could only rely on the Innate Origin Pool.

The shackles are broken, and the ninth-order life is completed!

In an instant, Ye Tian's life level began to transform, and the strength of his physical body also began to change.

This is a big breakthrough and a big transformation of strength.

Every second, Ye Tian's strength is improving, this is an improvement that surpasses everything.

A few hours later, Ye Tian truly completed his transformation and walked out of the Innate Origin Pool.

He didn't want to stay in the Innate Origin Pool all the time, in case something changed, even if it was his ninth-order life, he wouldn't be able to bear the endless purple light.

Ancestral monument.

On the list of god generals, Ye Tian's ranking has not changed, but the realm above has changed.

He is no longer an eight-star peak god general, but a nine-star early stage god general, but his combat power is not as good as other nine-star early stage god generals, and he is the weakest one among the nine-star early stage god generals.

But no matter what, Ye Tian still stepped into the ranks of the early stage god generals of the Nine Stars.
